————
1、（★★★重点）拆cp看清楚！！！
2、一见钟情万人迷，小世界基本都是1vn
3、玛丽苏文，无逻辑，泼洒狗血
4、女主性格不唯一，身份即为立场
————
诞生于欲望深渊的灵体，有着最极致的纯白，最美丽的外表，最致命的吸引力。
只需站在那里，就能吸引所有的目光。
她冷心冷情，唯爱自己，天生懂得玩弄人心，以情思作引，汲取七情六欲为养料。
凡是她出现的地方，必定会掀起腥风血雨的追逐。
可是她被爱意环绕，却无心无爱。
他们乞求她的爱，她说无爱者自由。
“爱”之一字，注定让上位者低头，尊贵者卑微。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/a5f4ae72fa533b21471c94f3b3439f0a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"月色知几许","author_id":"","book_id":"7542927053381700670","book_name":"综影视，她是万人迷","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8d8d8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1015,"name":"女频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1015&name=女频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":380,"name":"病娇","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=380&name=病娇&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":477,"name":"一见钟情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=477&name=一见钟情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1058,"name":"综影视","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1058&name=综影视&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7557359086824604222","read_count":"42929","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"339852"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"176","tags":"女频衍生,病娇,一见钟情,同人,综影视,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b84887d67ed16c5187af2dc448871d26~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779304863&x-signature=qg2ykMZ8AsgOUcWSgI04XZO63lc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4231339034028755","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"33"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322032103F795874E5802FC6058C9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读43分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_co 太太可以把重心也往这个文上面放一放，看着有很宏大的世界观，文笔本身也不错，女主性格也是冷心冷情，比综影视里面很多娇软动不动就哭的女主好多了。
很喜欢这篇文的风格，也很喜欢万人迷的设定，水到渠成的感情和细微处缓缓涌动的情绪都描述不错，希望不要断更啊。","text_exts":[{"e":131,"s":128,"text":"万人迷","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%87%E4%BA%BA%E8%BF%B7&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774120863FC6058C9%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227572987788042814270%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227542927053381700670%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%87%E4%BA%BA%E8%BF%B7%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763227078,"group_id":"7542927053381700670","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"平平无奇少女
